name: agentic-sage
description: Passive fleet judge for parallel Claude Code sessions — board, territory checks, merge briefings.

plugins.name: agentic-sage
plugins.description: Passive fleet judge for parallel Claude Code sessions. Bundles two skills: sage-fleet (collision check, claim intent, merge brief, why-diverged — advisory coordination through the sage CLI, a silent no-op when SAGE is off) and sage-doctor (validate the install — config, emitter hook, settings wiring, linked skills, current repo).
